## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Backend builds without errors (`go build ./...`)
- [ ] Frontend builds without errors (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No new dependencies added without discussion
- [ ] Commit message follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] DB schema changes include a migration script in `scripts/`
- [ ] New event types are handled in both the event bus and frontend WebSocket handler
